title: Basic methods: payback, accounting rate of return (ARR)
summary: 9609 A Level — payback period and ARR calculations.
learningObjectives: Compare strengths and weaknesses of each.

simpleExplanation.title: Simple investment tests
simpleExplanation.summary: Payback measures how long to recover initial outlay. ARR compares average annual profit to initial investment.
steps: Payback: cumulative cash until cost recovered.
ARR = average annual profit / initial cost × 100.

sections.content: **Payback and ARR** (10.3.2) — show **full working** and **state limitations** in evaluation.
